title: chlorophytum macrorrhizum
intro: Chlorophytum macrorrhizum, also known as Spilanthes acmella, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. Chlorophytum macrorrhizum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
